parts.text: My eGFR is 95 and my urine ACR is 1 mg/mmol, and I feel completely well. What does this mean?
My eGFR is 75 and my urine ACR is 2 mg/mmol. I have no symptoms. Should I be worried?
My eGFR is 50 and my urine ACR is 2 mg/mmol, and I feel fine. What does this mean for me?
My eGFR is 48 and my urine ACR is 15 mg/mmol. No new symptoms. How concerned should I be?
My eGFR is 40 and my urine ACR is 10 mg/mmol, my haemoglobin is 135, and I feel well. What does this mean?
My eGFR is 55, urine ACR 20 mg/mmol, haemoglobin 140, no symptoms. Do I need to contact anyone?
My home blood pressure was 128/78 today and my last eGFR was 52 with ACR 8 mg/mmol. Is this okay?
